About Us

First Crack Coffee Roasters is a symphony of coffee passion and dedication, bridging the gap between production and consumption of the finest Indian coffee. Founded by a group of coffee connoisseurs, First Crack works directly with Indian farmers to cultivate the highest quality beans.

What Our Clients Say

First Crack Coffee Rosters is my top choice for coffee brewing. Their team is knowledgeable and has helped First Crack Coffee Rosters is my top choice for coffee brewing. Their team is knowledgeable and has helped

Manish Odichya

A delightful sensory experience with its fruity aroma and sweet taste profile. Each sip reveals a well-balanced flavor, with distinct fruity notes complemented by a subtle sweetness that lingers on the palate. Perfect for those who appreciate a smooth and satisfying cup of coffee, this blend is ideal for both morning pick-me-ups and afternoon indulgences.

Team Curly Brew

I recently visited First Crack Coffee Roasters and tried their iced latte. It's amazing! Everyone should try it. I would like to mention their ambiance – it just gives off full coffee vibes.

Venu Sarda

Superb service, inviting ambiance, and the croissants are heavenly. Highly recommended!

Priyanka Chouhan

Absolutely loved First Crack Coffee Roasters' cold brew! Smooth, refreshing and full of flavor. My new favorite!

Abhishek choudhary

I just love their Cold Brew Summer – it's refreshing and perfect for hot days!

Eric H. Campbell

I recently bought their Golden Series #1, and I must say it's an exceptional blend with rich, complex flavors that make every cup a delight!

Rohan Jain

Mumbai Coffee Festival

A great experience and one of the best chapters of our coffee journey till date. I would like to show my gratitude for the support of the community that they have shown to First Crack Coffee Roasters. ....

Explore More
Coffee Library Dec 20, 2023

Coffee Terroir

The concept of terroir, commonly associated with wine, has also been applied to coffee. Terroir refers to the unique combination of environmental factors that influence the characteristics and flavors of a particular agricultural product, such as coffee beans.
